description_long: This object is a flat, widescreen computer monitor with a sleek, modern design. The front features a large, high-resolution display bordered by a thin, metallic bezel, and the screen currently shows a vivid landscape image. The bezel is uniform in thickness and has a subtle metallic sheen, giving the monitor a professional appearance. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-slim profile, emphasizing its lightweight and contemporary construction. The back of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding. There is no visible stand or support structure, suggesting it may be wall-mounted or intended for integration into a larger fixture.
description: A slim, widescreen computer monitor with a metallic bezel and a vivid display, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display area with a thin metallic bezel and a vivid landscape image.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-slim profile of the monitor, with no visible stand or controls.
description_view_2: Rear or top view showing a plain, dark surface with no visible features or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness and lack of visible controls or stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, metallic, and uniform in thickness, with a subtle sheen and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: No stand is visible; the monitor appears to lack a base or support structure in the provided views.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or surface of the monitor.
